action.reasoning: Observation: Beam search (w=5 + len norm) lifted test exprate to 0.0934 (new best, +0.004 from 0.0892); debug confirms clean matches on simple expr (sqrt{48}, 2 6, q_t=2q, 4^2+frac) but persistent failures on derivatives (symbol errors), long digit strings (truncation at 5 zeros), and some sub/superscripts. Loss plateaued ~1.01 after 20 epochs; model.py/train.py appear truncated in view but executed successfully last iter. Remaining budget ~31min / 12 iters. Analysis: Spatial ResNet + Bahdanau attn + aspect-pad(256x1664) + aug + LS is effective for basics; beam mitigates greedy/exposure bias for exact-match gains typical in HMER (+3-8%). Root limits are resolution for fine symbols and repetition modeling; code stability improved but needs full non-truncated classes for safety. Decision: Supply COMPLETE model.py (full MathExprRecognizer wrapper, complete _greedy_generate for val batches + _beam_search_single with proper hidden cloning/logprob accumulation/length-norm/best selection/EOS/SOS stripping); COMPLETE train.py (full resume from best.pt, aligned loss on targets[:,1:], grad_clip, per-batch+epoch jsonl metrics, height=288 for detail, bs=10/24, AdamW+plateau on val_exprate, 8 epochs to fit time). Run train+debug (expect ~20min) then submit_eval on best.pt; target >0.105 exprate via refined weights + beam.
